questions.q: How many years of work experience do you have with Java?

resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
job_details:
About the job
One of Australia's leading digital banks is building a modern real-time payments platform to power the next generation of financial transactions. As a technology-first organisation where engineering excellence drives everything, they're architecting distributed systems that process millions of payments daily with the reliability and performance their customers depend on.

We're seeking a Principal Engineer who wants to solve genuinely hard distributed systems problems in payments, in an environment that values craft, autonomy, and sustainable engineering practices.

The Role
Shape the architectural vision and contribute to the engineering of an Open Payments Platform that demands absolute correctness, sub-second latencies, and five-nines availability - because real money is moving through it.

Your work will span:
Designing fault-tolerant payment orchestration systems across multiple channels and payment schemes
Solving consistency, idempotency, and resilience challenges in real-time payment flows
Leading architectural decisions on microservices patterns, event-driven architectures, and integration strategies
Optimising JVM performance, NoSQL databases, and system architecture for high-throughput payments
Mentoring engineers on production-grade patterns and cultivating a culture of operational excellence
Driving technical design that balances business needs with long-term platform scalability
Reporting to the Principal Architect, you'll lead critical decisions while working hands-on to ensure the platform is built right - highly performant, reliable, and ready to scale.

The Stack
Core: Java 17+, Spring Boot 3.x, reactive streams
Cloud: GCP (GKE, Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, Cloud SQL, Spanner)
Data: PostgreSQL, distributed caching, event-driven architectures
Observability: Distributed tracing, structured logging, chaos engineering
CI/CD: GitOps, trunk-based development, progressive rollouts

Your Application Should Demonstrate
Proven track record designing and delivering large-scale, high-performance payment systems
Deep understanding of microservices, event-driven architecture, and integration patterns
Strong knowledge of payment orchestration, financial transaction security, and regulatory requirements
Experience driving architectural decisions across platforms with complex engineering initiatives
Pragmatic judgment about technical trade-offs and sustainable engineering practices
Clear communication skills across all levels of an organisation

Why Join
Work on systems where correctness, performance, and reliability genuinely matter
Engineering culture with autonomy and dedicated time for doing things properly
Collaborative team that values thoughtful design and continuous learning
Strong benefits: wellbeing leave, up to 20 weeks parental leave, professional development budget
Clear career pathways to principal/staff engineer or technical leadership

Location: Sydney | Permanent | Hybrid (3 days/week in office)

We're committed to building diverse teams and welcome applications from all backgrounds.
If you want to solve hard distributed systems problems that matter, in a team that values sustainability and craft, let's talk.
prompt:
Answer these employer screening questions professionally and honestly based on the provided resume.
For multiple choice questions, select the most appropriate option that matches the candidate's experience.
For text questions, provide clear, concise answers (1-2 sentences).
Be truthful - if the candidate doesn't have a specific qualification, indicate that politely while highlighting related experience.
